groups.label: Training Components
groups.description: Live and recorded sessions forming the core SHIVA Pracharaka certification curriculum.

modules.label: Live Sessions by Vaidya Satyajith's Students
modules.description: Interactive live training sessions delivered by experienced Panchakarma referral practitioners from Vaidya Satyajith's lineage. Covers practical referral scenarios, eligibility identification, and real-case discussions.

modules.label: Recorded Training Modules
modules.description: Self-paced recorded video modules covering the complete Panchakarma referral methodology, programme structure, and centre operations. Available on the Ayusurance platform.

modules.label: Patient Orientation Training
modules.description: Training on how to orient prospective patients about the Panchakarma process, what to expect, programme logistics, and how to address common concerns.

modules.label: Panchakarma Eligibility Awareness
modules.description: Module covering the Ayurvedic and constitutional criteria for Panchakarma eligibility. Equips the Pracharaka to identify strong candidates and avoid unsuitable referrals.

modules.label: Communication Training
modules.description: Training on effective, sensitive, and accurate communication of Panchakarma benefits, costs, duration, and programme expectations to prospective patients.

modules.label: Referral Ethics and Guidelines
modules.description: Guidelines covering ethical conduct in referrals, prohibition on misrepresentation, data privacy obligations, boundaries of the Pracharaka role, and the code of conduct under the Ayusurance framework.

groups.label: Learning Materials
groups.description: Reference documents and resources provided to all SHIVA Certified Pracharakas for ongoing use.

modules.label: Text Manuals
modules.description: Comprehensive written reference manuals covering the Sadaika Panchakarma programme, referral process, patient journey, and operational guidelines.

modules.label: Orientation Videos
modules.description: Short explainer videos designed for Pracharakas to share with prospective patients to introduce them to Panchakarma, the centre, and the Sadaika programme.

modules.label: Referral Checklists
modules.description: Standardised checklists for the Pracharaka to assess candidate suitability before making a formal referral. Ensures only well-qualified candidates enter the pipeline.

modules.label: Patient Communication Formats
modules.description: Pre-approved message templates and communication formats for WhatsApp, email, and in-person conversations with prospective patients.

modules.label: Standard Referral Templates
modules.description: Formal referral documentation templates to be completed when introducing a patient into the Ayusurance system. Ensures consistent and complete data capture.

modules.label: SHIVA General Ayurveda Awareness Course
modules.description: The foundational Ayurveda awareness course under the SHIVA framework. Provides essential background on Ayurvedic principles, Panchakarma rationale, and Vaidya Satyajith's lineage.
